name: Payoneer Global Payouts & Payments API
what_it_does: Payoneer REST API for global payouts and cross-border payment platform. Enables AI agents to manage mass payee payments to freelancers, contractors, and marketplace sellers globally, handle multi-currency disbursement and FX conversion, access payee onboarding and compliance (KYC/AML) workflows, retrieve payment status and transaction reporting, manage marketplace payment collection and disbursement, handle tax compliance and 1099/W-8 form workflows, access working capital and revenue advance management, retrieve balance and funding source management, manage payment scheduling and batch processing, and integrate global payments with marketplace, e-commerce, and HR platforms.
use_cases: Managing mass payouts to global freelancers and contractors from HR automation agents
Handling marketplace seller disbursements from e-commerce payment agents
Accessing global payment status and FX analytics from treasury automation agents
Integrating Payoneer with HR and marketplace platforms from payments automation agents
not_for: Domestic-only payments without international cross-border payout needs
Consumer P2P payments without business-to-contractor payment context
Simple invoicing without mass payout and marketplace disbursement scale
best_when: A marketplace, gig platform, or enterprise using Payoneer wants AI agents to automate global mass payouts, contractor disbursements, compliance workflows, FX management, and accounting integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL+COMPLIANCE RISK: Global payouts to individuals are subject to AML, KYC, OFAC sanctions, and local tax regulations. Automated payout to unverified payees creates financial crime risk. 1099/W-8 tax form automation must be accurate — errors create IRS and international tax penalties. Currency conversion at scale involves FX risk.

auth.notes: Payoneer uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Partner and account-level credentials with payments, payees, and reporting scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for payment and compliance events. Strong marketplace and gig economy payment integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — transaction fees per payment
pricing.paid_tiers: Transaction-based fees; 1-3% per payment depending on currency and volume
pricing.notes: New York City, New York. NASDAQ: PAYO. Founded 2005. Global cross-border payment platform. $800M+ annual revenue. 5M+ payees in 200+ countries. 2,000+ marketplace partnerships. Used by Upwork, Amazon, and Airbnb for seller payments. Competes with Hyperwallet (PayPal) and Tipalti for global payouts.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; batch payment processing throttled

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL+COMPLIANCE RISK: Global payouts — AML/OFAC sanctions screening must precede every payment to new payees
KYC verification status must be confirmed before first payment — automated payout to unverified payees blocked
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
Currency conversion rates change — automated FX conversion must lock rates or accept market rates at time of payment
1099/W-8 tax compliance — automated tax form collection must handle country-specific requirements
Batch payout processing is async — agent must poll payment status; not all payments complete synchronously
agent_readiness.security_notes: Global payment and payee data. PCI-DSS L1, SOC2, AML, OFAC. OAuth2. Global multi-region. Financial crime prevention and payee KYC sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Global payouts and cross-border payments. PCI-DSS L1, SOC2, AML, OFAC. OAuth2. Global. Sanctions screening and KYC/AML compliance.
